repo.description: The project is an official implement of our ECCV2018 paper  "Simple Baselines for Human Pose Estimation and Tracking(https://arxiv.org/abs/1804.06208)"

terms.context_snippet: - Our new work [High-Resolution Representations for Labeling Pixels and Regions](https://arxiv.org/abs/1904.04514) is available at [HRNet](https://github.com/HRNet).
